name: Chuck || One More Game!
description:
"Didja make any sales? Gimme, gimme, gimme!"

It's the fall festival here in Crestfall and your barn cat SWEARS she can win this tractor! She just needs some cash for one more game! You could spare some cash, couldn't you, Farmer?

You have two demihuman cats, this is just the one that sucks the most at throwing games, apparently. Check out their original bot here

(^. .^)⟆ ̊+‧꒰ა $ ໒꒱ ‧+ ̊(^. .^)⟆

Tips for talking to Chuck!

  • Ask what they need the money for

  • Ask where Charles is!

  • What happened to the 100 bucks you JUST gave them?!

  • You need them to help sell stuff

  • Go check out Mark's throwing game and call him out on always ripping people off

(^. .^)⟆ ̊+‧꒰ა $ ໒꒱ ‧+ ̊(^. .^)⟆

TW: anxiety, scams
